footer.brandDescription: India's smart bus booking platform. Compare operators, pick your seat, and travel with real-time GPS tracking and instant e-tickets.
footer.downloadDescription: Book tickets, track buses live, and manage your trips — all from your pocket. Download the BookMySeat app today.

offers.offerDescription: Save big on every journey with our latest promo codes and discounts.

services.servicesDescription: Everything you need for a smooth and affordable bus journey — all in one place.
services.bookBusTicketsDesc: Search from 650,000+ routes, compare operators, pick your seat, and book in seconds with instant e-tickets.
services.liveBusTrackingDesc: Track your bus in real-time on the map with GPS. Share live location with family and get accurate ETAs.
services.rentABusDesc: Planning a group trip? Rent AC and non-AC buses for weddings, pilgrimages, corporate events, and more.

whyChooseUs.whyChooseDescription: Experience the next generation of bus travel with real-time tracking, verified operators, and a seamless booking experience.

faq.faqDescription: Quick answers to the most common questions about BookMySeat.
faq.howToBook: How do I book a bus ticket on BookMySeat?
faq.howToBookAnswer: Simply enter your origin, destination, and travel date in the search bar on the home page. Browse available buses, select your preferred seat, fill in passenger details, and complete the payment. You'll receive an instant e-ticket on your phone.
faq.cancelReschedule: Can I cancel or reschedule my booking?
faq.cancelRescheduleAnswer: Yes! Navigate to "My Bookings" and click "Cancel" on the relevant booking. Cancellations made 24+ hours before departure receive a 90% refund. Rescheduling is available for select routes — check the booking details for eligibility.
faq.liveTracking: How does live bus tracking work?
faq.liveTrackingAnswer: Go to the "Track Bus" page and enter your bus name or number. If the bus has GPS tracking enabled, you'll see its real-time location on the map with estimated arrival times at upcoming stops.
faq.paymentMethodsAnswer: We accept UPI (Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm), credit/debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, RuPay), net banking, and popular digital wallets. All transactions are secured with industry-standard encryption.
faq.firstTimeDiscounts: Are there any discounts for first-time users?
faq.firstTimeDiscountsAnswer: Absolutely! First-time users get up to 15% off on their first booking with code BMSFIRST. We also have regular seasonal offers, cashback deals, and referral bonuses. Check the Offers page for current promotions.
faq.availability: Is BookMySeat available in my city?
faq.availabilityAnswer: BookMySeat covers 650,000+ routes across India, connecting 6,200+ bus operators in major cities and towns. Whether it's a metro city or a small town, chances are we have a route for you. Search your route to check availability.
faq.q1: How do I book a bus ticket on BookMySeat?
faq.a1: Simply enter your origin, destination, and travel date in the search bar on the home page. Browse available buses, select your preferred seat, fill in passenger details, and complete the payment. You'll receive an instant e-ticket on your phone.
faq.q2: Can I cancel or reschedule my booking?
faq.a2: Yes! Navigate to "My Bookings" and click "Cancel" on the relevant booking. Cancellations made 24+ hours before departure receive a 90% refund. Rescheduling is available for select routes — check the booking details for eligibility.
faq.q3: How does live bus tracking work?
faq.a3: Go to the "Track Bus" page and enter your bus name or number. If the bus has GPS tracking enabled, you'll see its real-time location on the map with estimated arrival times at upcoming stops.
faq.a4: We accept UPI (Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm), credit/debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, RuPay), net banking, and popular digital wallets. All transactions are secured with industry-standard encryption.
faq.q5: Are there any discounts for first-time users?
faq.a5: Absolutely! First-time users get up to 15% off on their first booking with code BMSFIRST. We also have regular seasonal offers, cashback deals, and referral bonuses. Check the Offers page for current promotions.
faq.q6: Is BookMySeat available in my city?
faq.a6: BookMySeat covers 650,000+ routes across India, connecting 6,200+ bus operators in major cities and towns. Whether it's a metro city or a small town, chances are we have a route for you. Search your route to check availability.

about.heroDescription: BookMySeat is more than just a ticketing platform. We are on a mission to make bus travel seamless, safe, and enjoyable for millions of people every day.

story.label: Our Story
story.title: A better way to get there
story.paragraph1: Founded in 2024, BookMySeat started with a simple observation: booking a bus ticket was harder than it needed to be. We set out to build a platform that brought transparency, reliability, and modern technology to the intercity bus industry.
story.paragraph2: Today, we partner with thousands of operators to bring you real-time inventory, live tracking, and instant support. We believe that the journey is just as important as the destination.

values.label: Why We Exist
values.title: Everything you need for a perfect journey

unmatchedSafety.title: Unmatched Safety
unmatchedSafety.description: Every bus on our platform is thoroughly verified for safety and hygiene standards.

support247.title: 24/7 Support
support247.description: Our customer success team is always ready to help you with your journey.

bestValue.title: Best Value
bestValue.description: We guarantee the best prices and offer regular rewards for our frequent travelers.

continuousInnovation.title: Continuous Innovation
continuousInnovation.description: From live tracking to VR seat previews, we continuously upgrade our tech.

contact.heroDescription: Whether you have a question about your booking, need help with a refund, or just want to share feedback, our team is ready to assist you.
contact.callDescription: For immediate assistance with your bookings or urgent inquiries.
contact.emailDescription: For general queries, feedback, or issues that require detailed explanation.
contact.emailResponseTime: We aim to reply within 4 hours
contact.ticketDescription: Create a dedicated support ticket to track your issue through to resolution.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Please read these terms and conditions carefully before using Our Service. These Terms outline your rights and responsibilities when using BookMySeat.

agreementToTerms.title: 1. Agreement to Terms
agreementToTerms.content: By accessing or using the Service, You agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If You disagree with any part of these Terms and Conditions, then You may not access the Service.

useOfService.title: 2. Use of the Service
useOfService.content: Our Service allows you to search for, compare, and book bus tickets. We act solely as an intermediary between you and bus operators.
useOfService.rule1: You must be at least 18 years old to use the Service.
useOfService.rule2: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account.
useOfService.rule3: You agree not to use the Service for any illegal or unauthorized purpose.

bookingsAndPayments.title: 3. Bookings and Payments
bookingsAndPayments.content: When you make a booking, you are entering into a contract directly with the bus operator. BookMySeat is not responsible for the actual performance of the bus service.
bookingsAndPayments.paymentContent: Payment must be made in full at the time of booking. Prices are subject to change without notice, but confirmed bookings will not be affected.

cancellationsAndRefunds.title: 4. Cancellations and Refunds
cancellationsAndRefunds.content: Cancellations and refunds are subject to the policies of the respective bus operator. BookMySeat may charge a nominal cancellation fee in addition to the operator's fee. Please refer to our Refund Policy for detailed information.

limitationOfLiability.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
limitationOfLiability.content: BookMySeat shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential or punitive damages, including without limitation, loss of profits, data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses, resulting from (i) your access to or use of or inability to access or use the Service; (ii) any conduct or content of any third party on the Service; (iii) any content obtained from the Service; and (iv) unauthorized access, use or alteration of your transmissions or content.

changesToTerms.title: 6. Changes to Terms
changesToTerms.content: We reserve the right, at our sole discretion, to modify or replace these Terms at any time. By continuing to access or use our Service after those revisions become effective, you agree to be bound by the revised terms.

contactUs.title: Contact Us
contactUs.content: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at

help.faqDescription: Quick answers to the most common questions about using BookMySeat.

howToBook.question: How do I book a bus ticket?
howToBook.answer: Go to the "Book Tickets" page, enter your origin, destination, and travel date, then select a bus from the available options. Choose your preferred seat, enter passenger details, apply any promo code, and proceed to payment. You'll receive a confirmation with your ticket details.

multiplePassengers.question: Can I book tickets for multiple passengers at once?
multiplePassengers.answer: Yes! During the booking process, you can select multiple seats and enter details for each passenger. All passengers will be included in a single booking under your account.

advanceBooking.question: How far in advance can I book a ticket?
advanceBooking.answer: You can book tickets as soon as they become available for a route. Typically, bookings open up to 30 days in advance, depending on the bus operator. We recommend booking early to secure your preferred seats.

paymentMethods.question: What payment methods are accepted?
paymentMethods.answer: We accept all major payment methods including UPI (Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm), credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, RuPay), net banking, and popular digital wallets. All transactions are processed through secure payment gateways.

paymentSecurity.question: Is my payment information secure?
paymentSecurity.answer: Absolutely. All payment transactions are encrypted using industry-standard SSL/TLS encryption. We do not store your card details on our servers. Payments are processed through PCI-DSS compliant payment gateways.

howToCancel.question: How do I cancel my booking?
howToCancel.answer: Navigate to "My Bookings", find the booking you wish to cancel, and click "Cancel Booking". The refund will be processed based on the cancellation policy — cancellations made 24+ hours before departure typically receive a full refund minus a small processing fee.

refundPolicy.question: What is the refund policy?
refundPolicy.answer: Refunds are processed as follows: cancellations more than 24 hours before departure receive a 90% refund; between 12–24 hours, a 75% refund; between 6–12 hours, a 50% refund. Cancellations within 6 hours of departure are non-refundable. Refunds are credited within 5–7 business days.

howToTrack.question: How do I track my bus in real-time?
howToTrack.answer: Visit the "Track Bus" page and search for your bus using the bus name or number. If GPS tracking is enabled for your bus, you'll see its live location on the map along with estimated arrival times at upcoming stops.

trackingNotAvailable.question: Why can't I see my bus on the tracking page?
trackingNotAvailable.answer: Real-time tracking depends on the bus having an active GPS connection. If the bus hasn't started its journey yet, or if it's in an area with poor network coverage, the location may not be available. Try refreshing after a few minutes.

howToCreateAccount.question: How do I create an account?
howToCreateAccount.answer: Click "Login" at the top of the page. You can sign in using your phone number or email. A new account will be created automatically on your first login. No separate registration is required.

forgotPassword.question: I forgot my password. How do I reset it?
forgotPassword.answer: We use phone/email-based authentication, so there's no password to forget! Simply click "Login" and verify your identity via OTP (one-time password) sent to your registered phone number or email.

amenities.question: What amenities are available on the bus?
amenities.answer: Amenities vary by bus and operator. Common amenities include air conditioning, WiFi, charging points, blankets, water bottles, and entertainment systems. You can view the specific amenities for each bus during the booking process.

help.tryDifferent: Try a different search term or browse by category.
